name: coliseo_python
description: **Current Version**: 3.0 Modular   **Sprint 1**: ✅ **COMPLETADO** - Refactor arquitectura (6 módulos, 100% v2.0 compatible)   **Sprint 2**: ✅ **COMPLETADO** - Roguelike Core System (30+ perks, Run system, Reward screen)   **Next Phase**: Sprint 3 - UI/UX Refinement (animations, polish)   **Timeline**: 6–8 semanas para MVP v3.0 listo para producción

scripts.build: mkdirp dist/ui && powershell -Command "Copy-Item -LiteralPath 'ui/index.html' -Destination 'dist/ui/index.html' -Force; Copy-Item -LiteralPath 'ui/script-modular.js' -Destination 'dist/ui/script-modular.js' -Force; Copy-Item -LiteralPath 'ui/manifest.json' -Destination 'dist/ui/manifest.json' -Force; Copy-Item -LiteralPath 'ui/sw.js' -Destination 'dist/ui/sw.js' -Force" && ncp ui/assets dist/ui/assets && mkdirp dist/ui/modules && terser ui/modules/index.js -o dist/ui/modules/index.js && terser ui/modules/player-config.js -o dist/ui/modules/player-config.js && terser ui/modules/menu-controls.js -o dist/ui/modules/menu-controls.js && terser ui/modules/game-state.js -o dist/ui/modules/game-state.js && terser ui/modules/combat-engine.js -o dist/ui/modules/combat-engine.js && terser ui/modules/ui-renderer.js -o dist/ui/modules/ui-renderer.js && terser ui/modules/roguelike-system.js -o dist/ui/modules/roguelike-system.js && terser ui/modules/ads-manager.js -o dist/ui/modules/ads-manager.js && terser ui/modules/reward-screen.js -o dist/ui/modules/reward-screen.js && terser ui/modules/analytics.js -o dist/ui/modules/analytics.js && cleancss ui/style.css -o dist/ui/style.css
scripts.cap-build: npm run build && npx cap sync android
